scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet Muhammad and his companions are shown arriving at Badr, with a sense of determination and faith.
scene_input.key_visual_action: The Prophet Muhammad riding a horse, looking at his companions with a determined expression
scene_input.setting: A desert landscape with the Prophet Muhammad and his companions arriving at Badr

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 150
schema_output.moral_lesson: Faith and determination lead to success

characters.name: The Prophet Muhammad
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, riding a horse

characters.name: Companions
characters.appearance: various builds and postures, wearing off-white thobes and plain woolen cloaks, some with white cloth head coverings

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad and his companions arrived at Badr with determination and faith, ready to face whatever challenges lay ahead.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast expanse of golden sand dunes stretches out to the horizon, with a few rocky outcroppings and sparse desert vegetation in the distance. Late morning sunlight casts a warm glow over the scene, with the sun shining brightly overhead. In the center of the image, the central figure rides a majestic horse, his face seen from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. The horse is a strong and proud beast, with a flowing mane and a shiny coat. To the left and right of the central figure, his companions are shown walking alongside their own horses, their faces turned towards the central figure, their expressions determined and focused. The companions are various builds and postures, wearing off-white thobes and plain woolen cloaks, some with white cloth head coverings. Soft warm golden light, sense of movement and energy. Medium shot from slightly above, capturing the vastness of the desert landscape. Warm beige, golden, and deep green palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
